roles.name: Cartographer of the Charts
roles.description: Plots the great chart — designs the over-arching Salesforce solution and reads the wind.

roles.name: First Mate
roles.description: Keeps the crew in line, the ship on course, and the captain's timeline honest.

roles.name: Quartermaster of the Hold
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and permission sets — knows where every barrel is stowed.

roles.name: Master Shipwright
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features in the shipyard's heat.

roles.name: Master Shipwright of the Pearl
roles.description: Senior shipwright — designs the keel and overrules the apprentices' lazy joinery.

roles.name: Commodore of the Fleet
roles.description: Captain over all Salesforce craft in the fleet — sets standards and commands the senior shipwrights.

roles.name: Boatswain of the Indies
roles.description: Patrols the rigging of customer requirements with practiced rope-craft.

roles.name: Deckhand of the Indies
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the deck under the Boatswain's eye.

roles.name: Powder Monkey of the Indies
roles.description: Newest aboard — runs the small jobs, learns the lines, fetches the powder.

roles.name: Master of the Spyglass
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond the horizon.

roles.name: Rigger of the Indies
roles.description: Lays the ropes of API, middleware, and event flows under the Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Rigger
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the saltwater patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Powdersmith of the Gun Deck
roles.description: Tests every charge before it fires — finds the duds in the build before they reach the captain.

roles.name: Town Crier of Tortuga
roles.description: Lifts the flag and the lantern for product and message — leads all marketing craft in the fleet.

roles.name: Herald of the Bay
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and plunder.

roles.name: Pamphleteer of the Quay
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the port — content, creative, and the daily broadside.

roles.name: Ship's Scribe
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between merchant Customer and the shipwright's craft.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Black Pearl — Free Crew Operations Platform
East India Trading Co. — Imperial Fleet ERP Rollout
Queen Anne's Revenge — Fountain of Youth Discovery Build
realms.subAccountName: Crew of the Queen Anne's Revenge

black-pearl-crew.name: Hoist the Black Flag
black-pearl-crew.description: Discovery sign-off — colours run up the mainmast over Tortuga.

black-pearl-crew.name: Refit at Shipwreck Cove
black-pearl-crew.description: Build kickoff: keel scraped and sails restitched at the Brethren's hideaway.

black-pearl-crew.name: Parley with the Brethren
black-pearl-crew.description: Mid-project gate: code review with the Pirate Lords.

black-pearl-crew.name: Raid on Port Royal
black-pearl-crew.description: Phase invoice trigger: a daring strike that pays the crew.

black-pearl-crew.name: Crowning of the Pirate King
black-pearl-crew.description: Go-Live: the new king of the Brethren Court is named.

black-pearl-crew.name: Shares Divided
black-pearl-crew.description: Hyper-care close: plunder counted and divvied per the Code.

flying-dutchman.name: Strike the Bargain
flying-dutchman.description: Project kickoff: a soul pledged to a hundred years' service.

flying-dutchman.name: Carve the Heart-Chest
flying-dutchman.description: Build phase: the captain's heart locked away from the ribs.

flying-dutchman.name: Summon the Kraken
flying-dutchman.description: UAT gate: the great beast called from the deep — does it answer?

flying-dutchman.name: Ferry of the Drowned
flying-dutchman.description: Go-Live: souls now ferried on schedule across the divide.

flying-dutchman.name: Heart Restored
flying-dutchman.description: Hyper-care close: the captain's heart returns to its rightful chest.

flying-dutchman.name: Toll of the Locker
flying-dutchman.description: Final invoice: every soul counted, every coin tallied.

east-india-trading-co.name: Royal Charter Granted
east-india-trading-co.description: Discovery: the Crown signs the writ — Company licensed to trade and to hang.

east-india-trading-co.name: Endeavour Sets Sail
east-india-trading-co.description: Build: the flagship leaves dry-dock under Norrington's command.

east-india-trading-co.name: Beckett's Audit
east-india-trading-co.description: Solution review with Lord Beckett — every ledger, every soul.

east-india-trading-co.name: Mass Hangings at Port Royal
east-india-trading-co.description: Go-Live: martial law in effect, gallows operational.

east-india-trading-co.name: Fleet Stand-down
east-india-trading-co.description: Project close: the Endeavour anchors and the marines stand at ease.

east-india-trading-co.name: Shareholder Dividend
east-india-trading-co.description: Final invoice: profits remitted to the directors in London.

queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.name: Vision in the Goblet
queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.description: Kickoff vision: Blackbeard sees the Fountain in the chalice.

queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.name: Mermaid Hunt at Whitecap Bay
queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.description: Discovery: a mermaid's tear acquired for the ritual.

queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.name: Forge the Chalices
queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.description: Build: Ponce de León's silver cups recovered and polished.

queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.name: Ritual at the Fountain
queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.description: UAT acceptance: the rite performed, the years exchanged.

queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.name: Drink of Eternity
queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.description: Go-Live + handoff: a life ends so another may continue.

queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.name: Captain's Final Recompense
queen-annes-revenge-blackbeard.description: Final invoice: the bond with the crew settled in shares of life.

Captain Jack Sparrow.notes: Marooned on a small island — strictly involuntary, but rum was found.

Hector Barbossa.notes: Apple-tasting tour of the Tortuga markets.

Will Turner.notes: Forge maintenance — restocking blades for Port Royal.

Elizabeth Swann.notes: Gown fitting at the Governor's residence — non-negotiable.

Mr. Gibbs.notes: Sleeping off shore leave at the Faithful Bride.

Davy Jones.notes: Organ recital practice in the captain's cabin — do not disturb.

Bootstrap Bill Turner.notes: Scraping barnacles off himself — quarterly grooming.

Lord Cutler Beckett.notes: Audience with the directors in London — annual.

Admiral James Norrington.notes: Wig powdering and uniform refit at the garrison tailor.

Mercer.notes: Quiet errand — does not appear on the manifest.

Governor Swann.notes: Visiting Elizabeth — paternal concern outweighs the schedule.

Edward Teach.notes: Beard-braiding ritual with slow-burning fuses — vanity ceremony.

Angelica Teach.notes: Convent retreat in Spain — penance before the next voyage.

Philip Swift.notes: Theological study — preparing sermons for an unwilling crew.

Syrena.notes: Tide-pool rest — gills require quiet salt water.
